---
title: "get_balance"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `get_balance()`

Get Account Balance

## Usage

```r
get_balance(kalshi_access_token = "KALSHI_API", demo = FALSE)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `kalshi_access_token` | Character. Environment variable name for API key. |
| `demo` | Logical. Use demo environment if TRUE. |

## Value

A list with balance information:

- `balance`: Available balance in cents

- `portfolio_value`: Current portfolio value in cents

## Description

Retrieves your current account balance and portfolio value.
Values are returned in cents.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
bal <- get_balance()
cat("Balance: $", bal$balance / 100, "\n")

## End(Not run)
```

## See also

Other portfolio: 
`get_fills()`,
`get_orders()`,
`get_positions()`,
`get_settlements()`
